blended.narrative: Smugglers Notch is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 58°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
